A US-based crypto educator struggled with low visibility despite consistent uploads. Through strategic SEO, content optimization, and data-driven growth planning — views grew nearly 4X, search ranking improved dramatically, and the channel hit YouTube Partner status.

75.4K Views / Month
TubeBuddy SEO Score: 5 → 100
11K+ Subscribers
Google Search Traffic ↑
01 — Client Overview

Who is the Client?

Billy McKinley is a US-based trader and content creator running BTM Crypto News Network — a YouTube channel focused on cryptocurrency, online earning strategies, and investment education.


Billy was a dedicated creator — publishing 3–4 videos per week and hosting regular live sessions. Despite his consistency and content quality, the channel struggled to gain traction. Views were low, audience reach was limited, and subscriber growth had nearly stalled.


The problem wasn't his content. It was the strategy behind it. He needed a growth partner who understood YouTube's algorithm, SEO, and the crypto audience — someone who could turn his effort into measurable results.

Channel Snapshot

Channel Name BTM Crypto News Network
Location United States
Niche Crypto / Investment
Upload Frequency 3–4 videos / week
Initial Subscribers ~5,545
Initial Monthly Views ~19.1K
Collaboration Start Early 2024
YouTube Channel ▶ @btmcryptonewsnetwork
02 — The Problem

What Was Holding the Channel Back?

🔍

Zero SEO Strategy

Videos had TubeBuddy SEO scores as low as 5/100. Titles, descriptions, and tags were not optimized for search, making discoverability nearly impossible.

👥

Limited Audience Reach

Despite 3–4 uploads per week, the channel struggled to reach its target audience. Most views came from existing subscribers, not new discovery.

📉

Stagnant View Counts

Individual videos were averaging 288–913 views. Quality content was being uploaded without a strategy to amplify it to the right audience.

⏱️

Weak Watch Time

Audience retention and watch time were below optimal levels, causing YouTube's algorithm to limit the content's organic distribution.

🏷️

No Keyword Research

Content topics were chosen without data. High-volume, low-competition keywords in the crypto niche were completely untapped.

🗺️

No Growth Roadmap

There was no long-term content strategy or structured plan for channel growth. Each video existed in isolation without a cohesive growth framework.

After (Jul 2025): 75,397 views · 11,188 subscribers · $121.14 estimated revenue · Watch time 1.9K hrs
04 — The Strategy

How I Did It

01

Channel Audit & Competitor Research

  • Conducted a full channel audit to identify performance gaps
  • Analyzed top crypto channels to find content opportunities
  • Identified weaknesses in SEO, structure, and visibility
  • Discovered untapped keyword opportunities in the niche
02

Keyword Research & SEO Optimization

  • Researched high-volume, low-competition keywords weekly
  • Optimized titles, descriptions, and tags for every video
  • Improved SEO scores from 5–10 up to 90–100
  • Aligned all content with actual user search intent
03

Weekly Content Planning & Strategy

  • Delivered weekly content plans with trending crypto topics
  • Provided structured guidelines for video production
  • Planned content calendars aligned with market events
  • Balanced evergreen and trending content strategically
04

Performance Monitoring & Optimization

  • Monitored CTR, watch time, and retention metrics weekly
  • Continuously refined strategy based on analytics data
  • Improved thumbnail strategy to increase click-through rates
  • Supported monetization setup and channel management
05

Social Media Promotion & Backlink Strategy

  • Promoted videos across social media platforms to drive external traffic
  • Built strategic backlinks from social platforms to boost video authority
  • Increased Google Search visibility through off-platform signals
  • Created a multi-channel traffic funnel — not just relying on YouTube alone
06

Evergreen Content That Keeps Ranking

  • Structured content to rank long-term, not just spike at upload
  • Optimized for both trending and evergreen crypto search queries
  • Videos continue to generate views months after publishing
  • Built a compounding content library that grows traffic over time

~4X Monthly Views Growth

Organic Traffic Breakdown

SEO + Social Media strategy created traffic from multiple sources — not just one platform.

26.9%

YouTube Search (Shorts)

Over a quarter of Shorts views come directly from YouTube search — a direct result of keyword-optimized titles and descriptions.

10.7%

Google Search

Videos now appear in Google search results — a significant achievement driven by strong SEO and social media backlinks.

63.7%

YouTube Suggestions

The algorithm started recommending videos to new audiences — a sign that watch time and engagement metrics improved significantly.

Months
Later

Evergreen Rankings

Optimized videos continue generating views 6–12 months after publishing. Ranked content delivers organic traffic with zero additional spend — a compounding asset.

Verified · YouTube Search Traffic Data
Real Data (Shorts Traffic): 26.9% of Shorts views from YouTube Search — SEO optimization validated by traffic source analytics

📸 Screenshot Proof — Audience Analytics (Jun–Jul 2025)

Audience Analytics (Jun 23 – Jul 20, 2025): 21.6K unique viewers · 6.4K returning viewers (loyal audience) · +219 new subscribers gained in 28 days — consistent organic audience growth through SEO-driven discovery

📸 Screenshot Proof — Audience by Watch Behaviour

Audience Watch Behaviour (Jun 2026): 55.7% New Viewers — SEO is consistently attracting fresh organic audiences · 36.0% Casual viewers · 8.3% Regular/loyal viewers. New viewer dominance confirms strong YouTube Search discovery.
07 — Journey

How the Collaboration Evolved

Phase 1 · Early 2024

Full Channel Audit

Analyzed all existing videos, channel structure, SEO gaps, and competitor landscape. Identified the biggest growth opportunities.

Phase 2 · 2024

SEO Overhaul Begins

Started optimizing existing video titles, descriptions, and tags. Introduced keyword research workflow and weekly content plans.

Phase 3 · Mid 2024

Views Start Climbing

Individual video views jumped from 288–913 range to 1.4K–3.3K. Channel monthly views grew from 19K to 28K and beyond.

Phase 4 · Late 2024

Monetization Achieved

Channel views consistently exceeded 75K/month. Monthly revenue grew from ~$47 to $121+ as a direct result of view growth. Subscribers surpassed 10K.

Phase 5 · 2025

~4X Growth Milestone

Monthly views hit 75,400 — nearly 4X growth from the starting point of 19.1K. Subscribers crossed 10,000. YouTube search traffic: 26.9% (Shorts).

Ongoing

Continued Partnership

Billy continues to reach out for content strategy, keyword research, and video optimization as needed. The growth continues.

"

Working with Mahbub transformed my channel completely. The SEO strategies, weekly content plans, and data-driven approach made a real difference. My views tripled, my revenue grew significantly, and I now rank on Google — something I never thought was possible for my channel.

Billy McKinley
Owner, BTM Crypto News Network · US-based Trader & Creator

09 — Why It Works

What Makes This Approach Different?

As a potential client, here's what you should know. Most YouTube "growth services" focus on one thing. This approach combines multiple proven systems that compound over time.

🎯

Strategy Before Action

Every move is data-driven. No guessing. Keyword research, competitor analysis, and analytics guide every decision before a single video is uploaded.

🔗

Multi-Platform Traffic

YouTube SEO alone is not enough. Social media promotion and backlink strategies bring external signals that help videos rank faster on both YouTube and Google.

📈

Long-Term Results

Videos ranked properly keep generating views for months and years. This is not a short-term spike — it's a compounding content asset that grows your channel permanently.
